description: India Book II, 51. Letter from Khalaf b. Yiṣḥaq about turmoil in Yemen and measures taken by Abu Zikri Kohen for ensuring Khalaf’s rights after the death of Abu Imran Nufay. Abu al-Yumn is also mentioned, and Khalaf further notes that the recipient of the letter, who was involved in the affair, had traveled from Egypt; Aden, fall 1138. (S. D. Goitein and Mordechai Akiva Friedman, India Book, 462) EMS.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12 מעדן. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
